scope: educational runtime advisor over AccelSim-Lite benchmark outputs

advisor_outputs.evidence: pointer_chasing shows 21.66x slowdown vs all-L1 access in simulated cache hierarchy study
advisor_outputs.recommendation: reduce pointer-heavy traversal, improve data locality, or restructure hot data into contiguous layouts

advisor_outputs.evidence: metadata_lookup regressed from 410ns to 620ns p95 in candidate benchmark comparison
advisor_outputs.recommendation: review lookup-path changes, reduce unnecessary map/tree probes, and preserve hot metadata in faster lookup structures
advisor_outputs.expected_impact: reduce p95 latency and avoid throughput regression

advisor_outputs.evidence: worker scaling flattened after 2 workers in queue-worker microbenchmark
advisor_outputs.recommendation: reduce shared queue contention, batch task pulls, or partition work per worker
advisor_outputs.expected_impact: improve scaling under higher worker counts

advisor_outputs.evidence: decode-heavy simulated inference profile remained dependency-bound after memory-port scaling
advisor_outputs.recommendation: focus on dependency scheduling and latency-sensitive decode path behavior rather than only adding memory bandwidth
advisor_outputs.expected_impact: better latency reasoning for decode-heavy serving traces
